title: Benchmarking Mouse Contamination Removing Protocols in Patient-Derived Xenografts Genomic Profiling
author: He, Funan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Benchmarking data were generated by mixing mouse and human RNA-sequencing data. 
 This dataset included the Buffy coat of NSG mice (host) RNA-seq fastq data
